user.title: Add a child
user.description: Set up schedule tracking for a child. You can then edit the full schedule from the integration options.

error.invalid_child_name: The child name cannot be empty.

abort.already_configured: A child with this name is already configured.

general.title: General
general.description: Child name and default location when no rule matches.

locations.title: Locations
locations.description: The list of locations used in the schedule (e.g. home, school, father, grandparents, camp).

weekly.title: Weekly schedule

weekly_add.title: Add a weekly slot
weekly_add.description: Public holiday extension: when enabled, holidays right before (or after) the slot extend it, e.g. a Monday holiday after a weekend slot extends the weekend to Monday. Handover times on extended days are configurable; leave them empty to keep the slot's regular times.

data.extend_start_on_holidays: Extend the start across adjacent public holidays
data.extend_end_on_holidays: Extend the end across adjacent public holidays
data.extended_start_time: Handover time on extended start days (optional)
data.extended_end_time: Handover time on extended end days (optional)

school.title: School / daycare
school.description: A regular place that changes where the child is, without changing who is responsible for them. Disabled on school holidays and public holidays.

data.closed_days: Extra closed days, e.g. bridge days (comma separated dates)

vacations.title: School holidays and alternation
vacations.description: Week/week alternation starts on the first Monday of each holiday period; before that, the weekly schedule applies. The starting location depends on the parity of the calendar year in which the holidays start.

holiday_periods.title: School holiday periods

data.name: Name (optional)
data.alternate: Apply week/week alternation to this period

date_ranges.title: One-off periods

exceptions.title: One-off exceptions

error.slot_order: The slot must start before it ends.
error.period_order: The period must start before it ends.

set_override.name: Set manual override
set_override.description: Manually override the child's location, winning over any planned schedule.

child_id.name: Child ID
child_id.description: Identifier of the child (slug of the child name).

start.name: Start
start.description: When the override starts. Defaults to now.

end.name: End
end.description: When the override ends. Leave empty for an open-ended override.

reason.name: Reason
reason.description: Optional reason shown in entity attributes.

clear_override.name: Clear manual override
clear_override.description: Remove the manual override and return to the planned schedule.

child_id.name: Child ID
child_id.description: Identifier of the child (slug of the child name).

add_exception.name: Add schedule exception
add_exception.description: Add a one-off exception that overrides the planned schedule for a date range. Persisted across restarts.

child_id.name: Child ID
child_id.description: Identifier of the child (slug of the child name).

location.name: Location
location.description: The location to apply during the exception.

reason.name: Reason
reason.description: Optional reason shown in entity attributes.

remove_exception.name: Remove schedule exception
remove_exception.description: Remove a persisted one-off exception by its ID.

child_id.name: Child ID
child_id.description: Identifier of the child (slug of the child name).

exception_id.name: Exception ID
exception_id.description: The exception identifier returned when it was added.

unknown_child.message: No child with ID {child_id} is configured.
